repos.name: agnosticui-monorepo
repos.description: AgnosticUI is a local-first UI kit that generates components directly into your project codebase, giving developers full ownership and making every component fully visible to AI tools. Built with Lit, AgnosticUI delivers accessible, framework-agnostic components for modern web applications.
